audit_items.proof_trace: All sdsfree/decrRefCount/zfree call sites in debug.c (L80, L110, L136, L144, L208, L211, L224, L294, L349, L493, L506, L517, L530, L733, L1179, L1186, L1201, L1331-1332) are preceded by the last use of the freed pointer in each code path — use-before-free ordering is consistently maintained. No double-free patterns exist: each pointer is freed exactly once after a single ownership path. The logCurrentClient OOB read (argv[1] with argc==1 at L1194) is a CWE-125 crash-handler defect, not a UAF, and is only reachable after the server has already faulted.
